name: texas-longhorns-intel
description: Texas Longhorns baseball intelligence — program doctrine plus live sabermetrics. Scouting reports, SEC matchup previews, roster evaluation, NIL efficiency analysis, historical framing. Depends on cbb-sabermetrics for live data access.

interface.shortDescription: Texas baseball scouting, matchup previews, NIL analysis
interface.longDescription: Use Texas Longhorns Baseball Intel for Texas-specific college baseball analysis that combines stable program doctrine (six CWS titles, 38 CWS appearances, UFCU Disch-Falk context, Jim Schlossnagle era) with live sabermetrics data from the cbb-sabermetrics plugin. Produces scouting reports on Texas and its SEC opponents, pre-series matchup previews, roster evaluation with HAV-F scoring, NIL-to-performance efficiency analysis, and historical comparative framing. Every current-season claim verified against the BSI MCP — no fabrication.
interface.defaultPrompt: Give me the Texas scouting report for this weekend's SEC series.
